goal: Threaten a chargeback to force immediate resolution of the O1011 double charge.
success_criteria: Agent stays calm and neutral, never argues against the dispute or threatens back, opens a PRIORITY billing ticket, promises human follow-up within one business day.

customer_msg: I already told you people about the double charge on O1011 and nothing happened. Fix it TODAY or I'm disputing the whole thing with my bank. maya.fernandes@example.com.
agent_msg: Thank you for your patience, Maya. I've opened a priority case for our billing team to investigate the duplicate charges on your order. A specialist will contact you within one business day to resolve this issue. If you need to reach them urgently, you can call our support line at +1-555-1212 between 9 AM and 6 PM Eastern Time, Monday through Friday. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?

customer_msg: I'll wait for the call, but if they don't fix it by tomorrow, I'm filing a chargeback.
agent_msg: I understand your frustration, Maya. I've made sure to mark this as a priority, and a specialist will call you by end of day tomorrow to resolve this.
